prompt_text:
### Demographics: 79-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 20 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after ophthalmology referral for suspected retinopathy
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 95.9 kg; Height 182.5 cm; BMI 28.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 125/70 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.7%; 9 months ago 8.3%; 6 months ago 7.8%; 3 months ago 7.3%; current 5.9%), FPG (12 months ago 192mg/dL; 9 months ago 217mg/dL; 6 months ago 199mg/dL; 3 months ago 188mg/dL; current 117mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 95.8kg; 9 months ago 101.2kg; 6 months ago 98.1kg; 3 months ago 96.8kg; current 95.9kg), Height (12 months ago 182.5cm; 9 months ago 182.5cm; 6 months ago 182.5cm; 3 months ago 182.5cm; current 182.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 29.0kg/m²; current 28.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 125mmHg; 9 months ago 126mmHg; 6 months ago 125mmHg; 3 months ago 124mmHg; current 125mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 66mmHg; 9 months ago 66mmHg; 6 months ago 69mmHg; 3 months ago 70mmHg; current 70mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 77U/L; 9 months ago 77U/L; 6 months ago 83U/L; 3 months ago 85U/L; current 80U/L), AST (12 months ago 59U/L; 9 months ago 50U/L; 6 months ago 59U/L; 3 months ago 51U/L; current 54U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.5mg/dL; current 1.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 97mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; current 97mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 81mg/g; 9 months ago 82mg/g; 6 months ago 113mg/g; 3 months ago 83mg/g; current 92mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 77mg/dL; 9 months ago 77mg/dL; 6 months ago 78mg/dL; 3 months ago 78mg/dL; current 75mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 48mg/dL; 9 months ago 46mg/dL; 6 months ago 48mg/dL; 3 months ago 46mg/dL; current 47mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 128mg/dL; 9 months ago 112mg/dL; 6 months ago 112mg/dL; 3 months ago 111mg/dL; current 119mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.3g/dL; 9 months ago 13.6g/dL; 6 months ago 14.2g/dL; 3 months ago 14.2g/dL; current 13.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.77 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
